---
title: Praveen K Singh
image: images/profile.png
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-width: 15em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    
  - text: "{{< iconify uiw:github size=2x >}}"
    href: https://github.com/singhpraveenk/
    target: _blank
    
  - text: "{{< ai google-scholar-square size=2x >}}"
    href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=1VBWBrMAAAAJ&hl
    target: _blank
    
  - text: "{{< ai orcid size=2x >}}"
    href: https://orcid.org/0000-0001-7173-5539
    target: _blank
    
  - text: "{{< ai researchgate-square size=2x >}}"
    href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Praveen-Singh-46
    target: _blank
    
  - text: "{{< ai scopus size=2x >}}"
    href: https://www.scopus.com/authid/detail.uri?authorId=56420981100
    target: _blank
    
  - text: "{{< iconify  uil:instagram-alt size=2x >}}"
    href: https://instagram.com/singhpraveenk_photography
    target: _blank
    
  - text: "{{< iconify uiw:linkedin size=2x >}}"
    href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/singhpraveenk
    target: _blank
    
  - text: "{{< iconify streamline-logos:x-twitter-logo-block size=2x >}}"
    href: https://x.com/singhpraveenk_
    target: _blank
    
  - text: "{{< iconify zondicons:envelope size=2x >}}"
    href: mailto:praveenglaciology@gmail.com
    target: _blank
---

<div style="text-align: center">Research Scientist<br>Laboratoire de Météorologie Dynamique - IPSL<br>École Polytechnique, Route de Saclay 91128, Palaiseau, France</div>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<div style="text-align: justify">
As a climate and atmospheric scientist, I investigate the intricate connections between air quality, climate change, and cryospheric processes across the Hindu Kush Himalayan (HKH) region. My work centers on understanding how short‑lived climate pollutants—especially black carbon—shape regional climate dynamics, glacier melt, surface albedo, and radiative forcing. To uncover these linkages, I integrate a wide suite of tools, including general circulation, regional climate, radiative transfer, radiation balance, and hydrological models, complemented by ground‑based observations, satellite measurements, and high‑resolution gridded datasets.</div>
